topics.title: GPT-5.4 vs Claude Opus 4.6: 2026 Coding Benchmark Showdown
topics.reason: GPT-5.4 (released Mar 5 2026) and Claude Opus 4.6 are both brand-new flagship releases, creating a head-to-head battle that perfectly matches 'claude vs gpt' and 'best ai model for coding 2026' high-traffic keywords. 12+ benchmarks available with structured data.
key_data_points: GPT-5.4 SWE-Bench Pro: 57.7% vs Opus 45% on novel engineering problems
Claude Opus 4.6 ARC-AGI-2: 68.8% — leads GPT-5.4 by 16 percentage points
GPT-5.4 pricing: $2.50/$15 per 1M tokens; Claude Opus 4.6: $5/$25 per 1M tokens
GPT-5.4 released March 5, 2026; Claude Opus 4.6 & Sonnet 4.6 released March 2026 with 1M context window

topics.title: LLM API Pricing Comparison 2026: 60+ Models, One Table
topics.reason: Three major new pricing structures dropped simultaneously in March 2026 (GPT-5.4, Claude Opus/Sonnet 4.6, Gemini updates). Matches 'llm pricing comparison 2026' and 'claude api pricing' high-traffic keywords. Evergreen structured data resource.
key_data_points: Claude Opus 4.6: $5.00 input / $25.00 output per 1M tokens
Claude Sonnet 4.6: $3.00 input / $15.00 output per 1M tokens
Gemini 2.5 Pro: $1.25 input / $10.00 output per 1M tokens
DeepSeek V3.2: $0.14 input / $0.28 output — cheapest high-quality option
Gemini 2.0 Flash-Lite: $0.075 input / $0.30 output — cheapest overall
GPT-5.4 Batch API discount: 50% ($1.25 input / $7.50 output)

topics.title: Best AI Coding Tools 2026: Claude Code vs Cursor vs Copilot
topics.reason: Claude Code hitting #1 in 8 months is a major industry shift. Survey data, pricing tables, and SWE-bench data make this a strong Format A (tool comparison with JSON data block). Developer community is actively debating this.
key_data_points: Claude Code: 46% 'most loved' developer rating vs Cursor 19% vs GitHub Copilot 9%
Claude Code Opus 4.6 backend: 80.8% SWE-bench Verified
GitHub Copilot: $10/month (free tier: 2,000 completions + 50 premium requests/month)
Claude Code launched May 2025, reached #1 within 8 months
